channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Palmos Analysis for Ελεύθερος Τύπος, 3–5 June 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
11 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Palmos Analysis for Ελεύθερος Τύπος, 3–5 June 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/greek_ep_polls/2026-06-05-PalmosAnalysis.html
